subject: The simplest way to cut no-shows for your business
body:
Hi {{firstName}},

GetSolvedIt sends your clients an automatic SMS before every appointment. You spend two minutes adding a booking — it handles the rest.

No more forgotten appointments. No more last-minute gaps you can't fill.

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reminders?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v1-founder
alternatives.subject: How much do no-shows actually cost you each month?
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm building a lightweight SMS reminder tool for small appointment businesses: add a booking, it texts your client a reminder at the right time. No apps, no chasing people yourself.

Would this be useful to you?

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reminders?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v2-soft-launch
